senses.example: He is faced with the fact of an irremediable marital breakdown.
senses.example_zh: 他面临着婚姻破裂不可挽救的事实。

senses.example: They advocated a complete divorce of government and religion.
senses.example_zh: 他们主张政教完全分离。

senses.example: He divorced his wife last week. // The couple divorced.
senses.example_zh: 他上个星期和妻子离婚了。这对夫妇离婚了。

senses.example: It is difficult to divorce sport from politics.
senses.example_zh: 运动很难完全脱离政治。

derivatives: 【用法】该词可作及物动词,~ sb. 表示"与某人离婚",~ ... and... 表示"(法官)判…与…离婚"。

entries.mnemonic: 发音:"死抱死"→死都要抱在一起死→配偶
